case_title: HUZAZI, MONICA vs. TANNER, ROY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANNER, ROY TANNER, DEBORAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3009 MISSION #208, STAYED UNTIL DEC-05-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, END OF DAY. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES, KEEPS ANY DEPOSITS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS.

FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES WAS DENIED. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED THAT THE ANSWER OF DEFT. IN THIS MATTER BE STRICKEN.
